commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=87be35433a66f4e6c27d5be81709300c14820362)
commands.review_summary:
The PR wraps Telegram stale spool claim recovery rename with ENOENT/EEXIST handling and adds a regression test for the race.

PR surface: Source +12, Tests +32. Total +44 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible: current main can throw ENOENT from the final recovery rename after an earlier stat/pathExists check, and polling catches that as a drain failure. I did not run tests because this review was required to keep the checkout read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] No repair lane should be queued yet because the remaining blocker includes contributor-supplied real behavior proof, and the test defect should be fixed on the PR branch before maintainer review continues.

target.title: fix(telegram): handle ENOENT race in spool drain recovery rename
target.author: sebtardif

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
